query:
SELECT id, name, isActive, silverArrUsd, goldArrUsd, silverDemosPw, goldDemosPw, silverDialsPw, goldDialsPw FROM commission_structures WHERE isActive = 1;
SELECT aeId, year, month, arrUsd, demosTotal, dialsTotal FROM monthly_metrics WHERE aeId = 30002 ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC LIMIT 6;
